channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dallas Stars going into playoffs without injured top goal scorer Jason Robertson
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Stars will begin the playoffs without top goal scorer Jason Robertson, who suffered a lower-body injury in their last regular-season game, coach Pete DeBoer said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PWHL chooses Vancouver as 1st expansion city with 2nd market to be determined, AP source says
item.description: The PWHL’s first expansion team will be based in Vancouver with an announcement scheduled for next week, a person with knowledge of the decision confirmed to The Associated Press on Friday. The person spoke on the condition of anonymity because the league has not revealed its plans.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pistons are back in the playoffs and take NBA-record postseason losing streak into Game 1 vs Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York beating Detroit had become something of an NBA certainty, with the Knicks doing it 16 straight times over a span of five years. The Pistons finally ended that streak with three wins over the Knicks during their massive 2024-25 turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs look to bounce back against the Diamondbacks Friday
item.description: Arizona Diamondbacks (12-7, fourth in the NL West) vs. Chicago Cubs (12-9, first in the NL Central) Chicago; Friday, 2:20 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LA is betting central with money on the Lakers and Clippers as the NBA playoffs begin
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Lakers often attract large betting interest anyway, but the controversial midseason trade that landed Luka Doncic from Dallas has people emptying their bank accounts to put money on Los Angeles. And the money, mostly fueled by casual bettors, is still coming.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Final AP mock NFL draft: Ward, Hunter, Carter go 1-2-3 and Saints trade up for Sanders
item.description: The Tennessee Titans explored all their options with the No. 1 pick in the NFL draft. They can’t pass up a shot at a potential franchise quarterback. If the Titans were going to trade the pick for more draft assets, a deal would’ve happened already.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Five stats and milestones that explain Steph Curry’s incredible season for Warriors
item.description: Steph Curry's longevity and scoring prowess were key factors in his work rewriting the NBA's history books this regular season.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Chisholm ejected for arguing called 3rd strike during Yankees' 6-3 win over Rays
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jazz Chisholm Jr. was ejected from the New York Yankees' 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Thursday night, then appeared to violate Major League Baseball's social media policy when he posted in-game criticism online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Haley Cavinder gets engaged to Cowboys star shortly after her sister's rumored breakup with Carson Beck
item.description: Former Miami basketball star Haley Cavinder announced Thursday she is engaged to Dallas Cowboys tight end Jake Ferguson after nearly two years of dating.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Thomas makes 11 birdies for a 61 to take the lead at Harbour Town
item.description: HILTON HEAD ISLAND, S.C. (AP) — Justin Thomas had a round to match the immaculate weather Thursday at Harbour Town with 11 birdies that allowed him to tie the course record with a 10-under 61 to lead the RBC Heritage.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Donald gets restraining order against woman he says stalks him and thinks they're married: reports
item.description: Three-time Defensive Player of the Year Aaron Donald has reportedly been granted a restraining order against a woman he says believes they are married.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears announce plans for Chicago NFL draft party at Soldier Field
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced their lineup of activities and entertainment for their NFL draft party on April 24, 2025, at Soldier Field, featuring exclusive on-field access, behind-the-scenes moments, and interactive activities, as well as appearances by current and former Bears players.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: WWE superstar Roman Reigns shows 'support' for Trump ahead of WrestleMania
item.description: Roman Reigns, despite being a registered Democrat in Florida, said the choice for this past election was 'very clear,' and he 'support[s' Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams' draft headquarters to be at LAFD Air Operations base to honor first responders to wildfires
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams will make their selections in the upcoming NFL draft from the Los Angeles Fire Department's Air Operations base in Van Nuys to honor the first responders who stopped the deadly wildfires that ravaged Southern California earlier this year.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NY Rangers' Panarin, MSG made settlement payments after employee sexual assault allegations: report
item.description: The NHL says the New York Rangers kept it apprised of an independent investigation into sexual assault allegations by a team employee against player Artemi Panarin and considers the matter closed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tyler Herro scores 38 as Heat eliminate Bulls in Eastern Conference play-in round for 3rd straight year
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Once again, the Bulls' quest to reach the NBA's 16-team playoff field ended at the hands of the Miami Heat.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: TJ Edwards signs extension with the Bears
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed linebacker TJ Edwards to a two-year, $20 million extension, with $16.6 million in guaranteed money, following the extension of defensive back Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors-Rockets schedule for first-round playoff series
item.description: (KRON) -- They took the hard way in, but the Golden State Warriors are officially in the playoffs after securing a spot in Tuesday's nail-biting win over the Memphis Grizzlies. The No. 7 seed Dubs (48-34) will face the No. 2 seed Houston Rockets (52-30) in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Rowdies' Fernandes set to face brother in U.S. Open Cup
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies' U.S. Open cup match against F-C Naples will be a family affair, as longtime Rowdies midfielder Leo Fernandes is set to face his younger brother, Gustavo.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DOJ suing Maine amid Title IX, trans athlete dispute
item.description: Maine's governor says a state law barring discrimination based on gender identity supersedes Trump's executive order.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Oler, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors edge Grizzlies in Play-In Tournament thriller, clinch playoff spot
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are officially going to the 2025 NBA Playoffs after a nail-biting 119-116 win over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night in San Francisco. The victory sets Golden State (48-34) up with a first-round matchup against the No.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC loses to St. Louis in season finale, 6-1
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - The historic inaugural season for the Utah Hockey Club has officially come to an end. Clayton Keller scored his 30th goal of the season, but Utah could not overcome a four-goal barrage in the first period by the Blues in a 6-1 loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hendricks plans to come back stronger than ever
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This was supposed to be the season Taylor Hendricks took a big step forward. After showing promising signs his rookie year, in which he averaged 7.3 points in 40 games, Hendricks was excited to be a big part of the Jazz rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks prospect Ryan Greene makes his NHL debut at Montreal
item.description: Ryan Greene made his NHL debut with the Chicago Blackhawks on Monday night, playing 13 minutes in a 4-3 shootout win at Montreal, and is expected to play in their final game of the season at Ottawa on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Popular beach in San Diego County to host surfing in the 2028 Summer Olympics
item.description: All eyes will be on San Diego County's coastline this summer! LA28 recently announced a popular state beach located in North County will set the stage for surfing during the 2028 Summer Olympics in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Prosecutor says whether Gaudreaus drank before deaths isn't relevant
item.description: According to the defense, the Gaudreaus had blood-alcohol levels of .129 or above, higher than the .08 legal limit in New Jersey and the .087 that police recorded for Sean Higgins.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past Nashville, 7-3
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (ABC4 Sports) - With nothing to play for but pride, the Utah Hockey Club is out to finish the season strong.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky select Ajsa Sivka, Hailey Van Lith in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Chicago Sky selected Slovenian stretch four Ajsa Sivka and TCU point guard Hailey Van Lith with their top two picks in the WNBA draft to address their need for perimeter shooting and to bolster their rebounding efforts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
